ai_summary: Aegis Logistics Limited has scheduled its 69th Annual General Meeting for August 7, 2026, to be held virtually. The key financial takeaway is the final dividend for FY2025-26, with a record date of July 10, 2026, making shareholders on record by this date eligible for payment by September 4, 2026, pending approval. This document is a standard regulatory filing informing shareholders of governance events and dividend eligibility, with no immediate red flags identified.
